mechanism_narrative: A negative 3-month change in FEDFUNDS signals active monetary easing that lowers discount rates and supports equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS was 0.16 percent in the latest available monthly snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if months with negative 3-month FEDFUNDS changes do not have higher average 20-day S&P 500 returns than months with nonnegative changes, or if the signal Rank IC is below 0.03 over two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE crosses upward by more than 0.3 percentage points over three months, labor-income deterioration reduces expected consumption and earnings, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE was 7.2 percent in the latest available monthly snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60 percent of cases, or if triggered mean returns are not below untriggered mean returns at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Joint contraction in RSAFS and PAYEMS identifies a self-reinforcing demand shock in which falling employment cuts spending and weaker sales drive further layoffs, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS was 343242 million dollars and PAYEMS was 135489 thousand persons in the latest available snapshots
failure_condition: Reject if the joint contraction trigger has no more negative 60-day return distribution than either RSAFS-only or PAYEMS-only contraction signals, or if the interaction term is not negative in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A low and falling HOUST reading signals ongoing residential investment contraction and bank credit stress, reducing cyclical earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST was 625 thousand units in the latest available monthly snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST weakness is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55 percent of cases or if triggered returns are not lower than unconditional returns over rolling 5-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp 3-month decline in INDPRO signals broad industrial output contraction and negative operating leverage for listed firms, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO was 106.1173 in the latest available monthly snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if the 5-day forward return after triggered INDPRO contractions is not below the unconditional 5-day return, or if the hit rate for negative returns is below 52 percent across out-of-sample triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is at the zero lower bound and CPIAUCSL is falling, conventional policy easing is exhausted and deflation raises real debt burdens, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS was 0.16 percent and CPIAUCSL was 213.06 in the latest available snapshots
failure_condition: Reject if the joint FEDFUNDS-CPIAUCSL trigger does not underperform periods with FEDFUNDS <= 0.25 alone, or if 60-day forward returns are positive in more than 60 percent of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: A negative quarter-over-quarter change in GDPC1 signals economy-wide demand contraction that lowers aggregate revenue and profit forecasts, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 was 11712.4 billions of chained 2017 dollars in the latest available quarterly snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if negative GDPC1 growth observations do not have lower subsequent 60-day S&P 500 returns than positive GDPC1 growth observations, or if coefficient signs flip positive in two consecutive walk-forward folds.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous PAYEMS contraction and an upward UNRATE move identifies accelerating labor-market stress that forces earnings downgrades before policy effects arrive, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS was 135489 thousand persons and UNRATE was 7.2 percent in the latest available snapshots
failure_condition: Reject if the combined PAYEMS-UNRATE trigger fails to predict lower 20-day returns than either single-series trigger, or if the interaction signal has a nonnegative average return across out-of-sample triggered months.
